duplicate_check.mechanism_keyword_overlap_with_prior_rou: R335 tree-frog toe-pad context-moistness scalar gate uses a scalar context gate; R330 Venus flytrap two-stimulus pre-commit is event-triggered gate. verdict: ACCEPT-WITH-ADJACENCY-NOTE (adjacent to R335 scalar gate + R330 two-stimulus pre-commit; distinct in event-triggered cyclic hard-gate with scheduled mid-session attention burst)
